title: ajuga ciliata f. typica
intro: Ajuga ciliata f. typica, also known as the bugle or Ajuga, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ajuga ciliata f. typica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
